name: Waffles Using Pancake & Waffle Mix (Mm#23)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the waffle iron.
2. Separate the eggs, placing the whites in a small bowl and the yolks in a mixing bowl.
3. Beat the egg whites with a rotary beater or whisk until they form firm peaks.
4. Beat the egg yolks in the mixing bowl until well mixed, then beat in the milk and melted butter.
5. Gradually stir the pancake mix into the liquid ingredients, blending just until the dry ingredients are moistened (do not overmix to avoid a smooth batter).
6. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites.
7. Place the batter in the preheated waffle iron and bake according to the manufacturer's instructions for heat settings and cooking times.
8. Check for doneness when no more steam rises from the edges of the iron. If needed, continue baking until fully cooked.
9. For freezing: Bake only until lightly golden. Cool on wire racks, then wrap airtight for storage in the freezer. Reheat in a toaster before serving.
